name: BharatPe Indian Merchant Payments and UPI API
what_it_does: BharatPe Indian merchant payment and UPI REST API for Indian merchants, distributors, and fintech platforms to accept UPI payments, generate QR codes, access merchant analytics, and utilize BharatPe's lending and financial services — enabling UPI-based merchant payment acceptance, interoperable QR code generation, transaction reconciliation, and working capital loan access through BharatPe's merchant financial services platform serving 13M+ Indian merchants. Enables AI agents to manage UPI payment for Indian QR-based payment automation, handle QR code generation for merchant payment display automation, access transaction data for merchant analytics automation, retrieve settlement for merchant disbursement automation, manage refund for payment reversal automation, handle webhook for payment event notification automation, access lending for working capital automation, retrieve bill payment for utility acceptance automation, manage loyalty for merchant rewards automation, and integrate BharatPe with Indian retail, distribution, and lending platforms for merchant financial services automation.
use_cases: Generating UPI QR codes for Indian merchant offline and online payment acceptance automation agents
Accessing transaction analytics and merchant settlement data for Indian retail business automation agents
Processing UPI payments and refunds for Indian e-commerce and marketplace automation agents
Integrating BharatPe with Indian merchant lending for working capital credit assessment automation agents
not_for: Non-Indian markets (BharatPe is India-specific merchant payment platform)
Consumer P2P payments (BharatPe is merchant-focused, not consumer wallet)
International cross-border payments (BharatPe is domestic Indian UPI payment)
best_when: An Indian merchant, distribution platform, or fintech company wanting AI agents to generate UPI QR codes, process merchant payments, access transaction analytics, and integrate merchant lending through BharatPe's merchant financial services platform.
avoid_when: UPI NPCI REGULATIONS: BharatPe UPI operates under NPCI (National Payments Corporation of India) regulations; automated non-NPCI-compliant UPI implementation creates regulatory violation; automated must comply with NPCI UPI guidelines for payment acceptance. MERCHANT ONBOARDING REQUIRES KYC: BharatPe merchant onboarding requires GST/Aadhaar/PAN KYC verification; automated instant merchant access assumption creates pending_kyb state; automated must complete BharatPe merchant KYC process. UPI IS INTEROPERABLE: BharatPe QR uses UPI interoperable standard; automated BharatPe-proprietary QR assumption misses cross-wallet acceptance; automated should leverage UPI interoperability for acceptance from all UPI-enabled apps (PhonePe, GPay, Paytm, etc.). MERCHANT FOCUS ONLY: BharatPe is merchant-side platform; automated consumer payment initiation assumption creates wrong product model; automated is for merchant payment acceptance, not consumer payment app.

auth.notes: BharatPe uses API key for merchant API authentication. REST API with JSON. New Delhi, India HQ. Founded 2018 by Ashneer Grover and Shashvat Nakrani. Products: UPI QR merchant payment, transaction analytics, merchant settlement, working capital loans (BharatPe Lending), bill payments, BNPL for merchants. SDKs: None public. NPCI licensed. 13M+ merchants. RBI regulated. Backed by Sequoia India, Tiger Global, and others. Competes with Razorpay and Cashfree for Indian merchant payments.

pricing.free_tier_limits: UPI acceptance is zero MDR for merchants; revenue from lending and premium services
pricing.paid_tiers: UPI QR: free; premium analytics, lending, and B2B features: tiered pricing
pricing.notes: New Delhi IN. NPCI, RBI. UPI zero MDR. 13M+ merchants. Working capital lending focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; payment and analytics APIs throttled

known_agent_gotchas: MERCHANT KYC IS MANDATORY: BharatPe merchant onboarding requires GST, Aadhaar, and PAN verification; automated instant merchant access assumption creates pending_kyc state; automated must complete BharatPe KYC process before production merchant API access

UPI IS INTEROPERABLE NOT PROPRIETARY: BharatPe QR generates UPI-standard interoperable QR codes; automated BharatPe-only acceptance assumption misses all UPI apps (PhonePe, GPay, Paytm users can all pay); automated should market BharatPe QR as 'accepts all UPI' not 'BharatPe only'

ZERO MDR ON UPI: BharatPe does not charge merchant discount rate on UPI transactions per RBI zero MDR mandate; automated fee assumption on UPI creates wrong cost model; automated UPI payment acceptance is free for merchants

NPCI UPI COMPLIANCE: UPI payments must comply with NPCI transaction guidelines and velocity limits; automated unlimited transaction volume assumption creates NPCI velocity monitoring; automated must implement NPCI-compliant transaction limits and suspicious activity monitoring

WEBHOOK FOR ASYNC PAYMENT CONFIRMATION: UPI payments may have async confirmation delay; automated synchronous confirmation assumption creates premature order processing; automated must implement BharatPe webhooks for payment confirmed event before order fulfillment
agent_readiness.security_notes: Indian merchant payments. RBI, NPCI, PDPB. API key. India. UPI merchant payment and transaction data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Indian merchant payments. RBI, NPCI. API key. India. UPI payment and merchant transaction data.
